steps.title: Read the concession
steps.content: The underlined phrase concedes that income affected fuel choice. But the sentence immediately argues that other factors also influenced decisions, showing that the energy ladder model makes income too central.

steps.title: Identify the function
steps.content:
• Choice A: Treats the phrase as anticipating an objection, but it qualifies the model's claim.
  • Choice B: Says the assumption lacks support, but the text grants income mattered.
  • Choice C: Captures that income played a role, though its importance is overstated.
  • Choice D: Misstates the function as conceding a finding seems unsupportive.
The answer is C.
